details: The agent ran `kubectl-axi nodes` which directly showed the single node (kubectl-axi-bench-control-plane) is Ready with no pressure, then confirmed this with `kubectl-axi triage`. The agent correctly identified the node as healthy with no resource pressure, and accurately distinguished that the unschedulable pods were due to missing StorageClass and unmatched node affinity selectors—not node resource exhaustion. The final answer was definitive and correct.
